chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-276 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1058/2023. 3. For haring of main case. 15.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. On 16.05.2023 none was present for the petitioner without intimation. On the next date of hearing i.e. 18.07.2023 none was present for the petitioner without intimation. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of over two years learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
